## Goal

What production problem should this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the workflow or feature.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Script import
- [ ] Character consistency
- [ ] Timeline
- [ ] Review console
- [ ] Video provider
- [ ] ComfyUI
- [ ] TTS/audio
- [ ] Documentation

## Why It Matters

Explain how this improves AI comic-drama or short-video production.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler or existing approaches.
